# Extracao: Launch Partnership

- **Fonte:** Launch Partnership.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MINI-MODULE LAUNCH PARTNERSHIP

Welcome to Launch Partnership. If you’ve ever considered helping other people with their launches – as a Launch Manager, a Launch Consultant, or even as a full business partner – then this will be critical to your success.

1 Introduction [3 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to how to build a business by partnering with others and some of the key considerations to keep in mind.

2 Client Selection [13 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about what makes a good client or partner and what to look for (and what mistakes to avoid) when thinking about potential clients.

3 Three Types of Deals [16 minutes]
There are three main types of launch partnerships or deals. In this lesson you'll learn about each one, and some of the ways to structure and approach these deals.

4 Negotiating [14 minutes]
This lesson is about how to negotiate, what to negotiate, and the importance of value-based selling.

5 The PLM Model [17 minutes]
This lesson goes into more depth on the Product Launch Manager model and some of the key questions and considerations to keep in mind if you're considering this type of partnership.
